final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-view illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be an exploded/disassembled layout with all parts spread out and connected by guide lines to their labels
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all its individual components, each labeled with its name
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include component name labels for every part (e.g. sensor, shutter, lens mount, body shell, battery compartment, viewfinder, LCD screen, dials, buttons, PCB, etc.)
Constraints: must preserve accurate part placement relative to the Sony A7 body structure; all parts must be clearly separated and identifiable
Avoid:
